WMI-3 attacker content in authoritative position (offset-controlled-write): external content is written at an attacker-controlled offset ('to') into object 'struct siginfo' — reaching past its buffer into a trailing field (the authoritative position the consumer follows). \[mechanism:write-at-attacker-offset;indicates=WMI-3\] \[mem:struct=siginfo;field=to;offset=?\] \[oracle:assert=to stays within the object's declared buffer;assume=external content written at a variable offset into the object\]
